ResearchTabDef.label: cybernetics
ResearchTabDef.generalDescription: Prosthetics, bionics, implant modules, cyberbrains and the paths beyond the body. Research at a hi-tech research bench; you can only have one active project at a time.

ResearchProjectDef.label: surgical implantation
ResearchProjectDef.description: The surgery behind every implant: anchoring hardware, splicing it to nerve, and keeping the patient alive through it. Once known, any implant can be fitted, from a wooden foot to an archotech brain.
